explanation: Flour, Sugar, Baking Soda, and Salt are all essential dry, powdery, or granular ingredients commonly measured in baking. An Egg is a liquid ingredient, typically used for binding or leavening, making it the odd one out.

The Great Pyramid of Giza, Hanging Gardens of Babylon, Colossus of Rhodes, and Temple of Artemis are all traditionally listed among the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World. Machu Picchu is one of the New Seven Wonders of the World.
Helix, Corkscrew, Gyrating, and Swirl all describe a type of rotational or spiraling motion. Linear describes movement in a straight line.
